description: A landmark building in Zhengzhou, a historical site commemorating the workers' strike on the Jinghan Railway, particularly spectacular at night.
A landmark building in Zhengzhou's CBD, nicknamed 'Big Corn' due to its corn-shaped appearance, featuring stunning nighttime lighting effects.
An ecological wetland park in Zhengdong New District, offering a beautiful environment ideal for leisurely walks and sightseeing.
A comprehensive park in downtown Zhengzhou, featuring lush greenery and serving as a popular leisure destination for residents.
A large cultural theme park on the southern bank of the Yellow River, offering elevated views of the river and an immersive experience of Yellow River culture.
A historical bridge ruins park with a tranquil environment, perfect for relaxation.
A Yellow River cultural theme park, with the iconic statues of the Yan and Huang Emperors as its signature attraction.
An ancient Taoist temple in Zhengzhou with traditional architectural styles and a thriving incense-burning tradition.
A significant historical site along the Yellow River, where the 1938 Huayuankou breach event occurred, blending historical culture with natural scenery.
A professional museum showcasing the history and culture of Yellow River management.
